items.title: 【COVER】ECHO - Arata Rora ver.
items.description: My own take on 'ECHO' with a darker vocal tone and layered harmonies. Focused on character expression, controlled dynamics, and detailed mixing to match the intensity of the song.

items.title: Aitou, Soshite Nichijou wa Tsuzuku - by Ukaroku-san
items.description: A soft and emotional cover that leans into storytelling and subtle vocal textures. I tried to keep it intimate, like whispering feelings into a quiet room.

items.title: Pilu - Arata Rora ver.
items.description: Another dedicated song for /cough/ a friend of mine. A heartfelt performance with warm mixing and gentle phrasing. Totally normal dedication. Probably.
